phrases.intent_en: Ask for directions to the basilica
phrases.text_local: Excusez-moi, c'est par où la basilique Notre-Dame ?
phrases.pronunciation: ex-koo-ZAY mwah, say par OO lah bah-zee-LEEK notr-DAHM
phrases.cultural_note: Notre-Dame Basilica is the crown jewel of Vieux-Montréal. The cobblestoned streets of the old city were built over French colonial foundations dating to 1642.

responses.english: It's just down the street, on the right.
responses.phonetic: bawn-ZHOOR, OO ay la PLAHS zha-kar-TYAY
responses.local: C'est juste en bas de la rue, à droite.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Old Port waterfront is
phrases.text_local: Le Vieux-Port, c'est de quel côté ?
phrases.pronunciation: luh vyuh-POR say duh kel ko-TAY
phrases.cultural_note: The Vieux-Port is a revitalized waterfront along the St. Lawrence River with cycling, inline skating, and the Science Centre.

responses.english: It's towards the south, just go down Saint-Paul street.
responses.phonetic: luh VYUH por SEST duh kel koh-TAY
responses.local: C'est vers le sud, descendez simplement la rue Saint-Paul.

phrases.intent_en: Ask a calèche driver for a carriage ride price
phrases.text_local: C'est combien pour une promenade en calèche ?
phrases.pronunciation: say kom-bee-YAN poor OON prom-NAHD ahn kah-LESH
phrases.cultural_note: Horse-drawn calèche rides depart from Place d'Armes. Agree on price before boarding. They're a charming but debated tradition.

responses.english: Twenty-five dollars per person for one hour.
responses.phonetic: bawn-ZHOOR kawn-BYEN koot oon proh-muh-NAHD awn ka-LESH
responses.local: Vingt-cinq dollars par personne pour une heure.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which street has the best restaurants
phrases.text_local: Quelle rue a les meilleurs restos dans le Vieux ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel ROO ah lay may-YUR res-TOH dahn luh VYUH
phrases.cultural_note: 'Resto' is the common Québécois shorthand for restaurant. Rue Saint-Paul and Rue Notre-Dame offer the most varied dining in Old Montréal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about a ghost tour of Old Montréal
phrases.text_local: Est-ce qu'il y a des visites fantômes dans le Vieux-Montréal ?
phrases.pronunciation: ess-KEEL ee ah day vee-ZEET fahn-TOHM dahn luh vyuh mon-ray-AHL
phrases.cultural_note: Several companies offer evening ghost tours of Old Montréal in both French and English. The neighbourhood's 400-year history makes for great stories.

responses.english: Yes, departures are in front of the basilica every evening.
responses.phonetic: ES suh kee GREK ah day VEE-zit fahn-TOHM daw(n) luh VYUH mon-ree-AL
responses.local: Oui, les départs se font devant la basilique chaque soir.
